feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Datasphere
feed.subtitle: SAP Datasphere Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAC Story : Recent n Dates calculation
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I am working on a SAC Story(Optimized Design) based on a Datasphere live model*.

There is a measure named, Inventory Date*. My requirement is to display the latest/recent 10 dates from the Inventory date in the SAC table.

SAC Table Column would contain the latest 10 Inventory dates and Table row will have one measure value in row section of the table

Note:Extra Information

1.Inventory Date only displays the Monday's date . For example, for any of the dates among 7th ,8th,9th,10th May 2024, Inventory date would be 6th of may(i.e Monday).I have already created calculation to display only the Monday's date.

2.We are using a live model, so number of entries in Inventory date column may vary. We need the most recent 10 dates.

Please help me to achieve this calculation.

Regards,

Krishn Kant

entry.title: Función "Sumar distinto"
entry.content:
Buenos días estimados colegas. 

De antemano, agradezco el apoyo que puedan brindarme con esta consulta, puesto que no soy del equipo de TI de la empresa en que laboro (empresa de gobierno), soy usuario funcional, sin embargo, he explorado mucho la herramienta de Datasphere y SAC y a la fecha, soy el que más conoce de ellas 😅, pero hay mucho conocimiento técnico que aún no comprendo y tampoco pueden apoyarme los compañeros de TI, así que ahí les va mi consulta:

Resulta que en mi modelo de datos de Datasphere, tengo una tabla de datos similar a esta:

NOMBRE PROVEEDORITEM A COMPRARPRESUPUESTO POR ITEM (Para fines de comprensión he unido las celdas, pero el valor se encuentra en cada filaCANTIDAD ADJUDICADAPRECIO OFERTADOMONTO ADJUDICADO MONTO ADJUDICADO POR ITEM
PROVEEDOR AITEM 1$10,000.0050$95.00$4,750.00$9,250.00
PROVEEDOR BITEM 150$90.00$4,500.00
PROVEEDOR AITEM 2$5,000.0050$45.00$2,250.00$4,600.00
PROVEEDOR BITEM 250$47.00$2,350.00
PROVEEDOR AITEM 3$7,000.00200$34.00$6,800.00$6,800.00
PROVEEDOR CITEM 4$3,000.00150$18.00$2,700.00$2,700.00
TOTALES $25,000.00550 

$23,350.00

$23,350.00

Y en SAP Analytics Cloud necesito mostrar una gráfica como ésta:

Como pueden observar, en este caso, la adjudicación de la compra, tanto para el item 1 como para el item 2, se ha realizado a 2 proveedores distintos, a cada uno se ha asignado una cantidad, con el precio ofertado y  obtenemos el monto adjudicado para cada uno, sin embargo, el presupuesto aprobado de cada item es uno solo. Siendo honesto, no puedo replicar esta gráfica en SAC, puesto que al sumar el presupuesto, obviamente, duplica el monto para los item 1 y 2 y no me da el dato real.

Necesito de su ayuda o consejos de dónde encontrar material que me ayude a construir lo anterior.

Nuevamente, agradezco el apoyo que puedan brindarme.

Slds

entry.title: SAP Datasphere - Create an outbound interface to send the data to SFTP-Server from Datasphere
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

1. Can we export the daily delta datasets to the Non-SAP application or file server in a flat file (CSV or XLS format) via SFTP connection directly from the datasphere view or local table?
2. Can we generate a filename based on timestamp (yyyymmdd_hhmmss)?

Currently, this is possible with BW. We have a process chain where process steps are created with the ABAP program and its variants to generate and transfer the data from a particular DSO to the CFTP server.

Below is the BW process chain screenshot which showcases the file generation and transfer steps (It is using ABAP code with a variant where the variant contains the DSO names and the loading date based on which the delta dataset is created).

Is this possible with SAP Datasphere?

Thanks!

Regards,

Mandar Damle

entry.title: Connecting to an SAP Analytics Cloud tenant to SAP Datasphere Catalog
entry.content:
Hello experts!

We are trying to connect our SAP Analytics Cloud Tenant with our SAP Datasphere Catalog. But we ran into an error that we can't really understand.

We are following the steps detailed here: Connecting to Data Sources | SAP Help Portal under SAP Analytics Cloud Tenant Connection to create a new System.

Once we push the "+" icon to create a new system we fill the boxes with the following information: 

  • System Type: SAP Analytics Cloud
  • Name: SAP Analytics Cloud 
  • UUID of our SAC Tenant

And as an Authenticated System User, I am assuming that the authenticated system user is the user with whom I am making the connection with, and that would be my user (the one I am logged on in Datasphere) while our shared mailbox generic user is getting configured to use.

But when we click the buttom "Authenticate Now" we run into the following error:

Failed to (getAuthorizationAddress) due to an error: {"status":404,"code":"com.sap.orca.starter.core.exception.NotFoundException","message":"No resource com.sap.orca.svc.tenantmanagement.model.TmsTenant exists with uuid [our sac UUID]"} 

We looked for similar errors and we found this one here: 3338522 - Connecting SAC as Data Source for Catalog fails due Error "The UUID couldn't be verified" (sap.com). But it is not quite the same error we are encountering. So we are looking for other alternatives. (Our tenants' landscapes are in different countries but within the same continent)

  • Can you help us identify what could be causing that type of error?
  • Are we missing some configuration from SAC's side?

I am adding the error pictures here:

Thanks in advance!

Rebeca

entry.title: SAC Mobile Cannot Find Model Information Error
entry.content:
Hello everyone,
We have prepared a special version for mobile so that our users can view an existing report on mobile. The data source for some of these reports comes from Datasphere, while the model for another is Import Model.
Import Model reports open smoothly on mobile. However, reports running with Datasphere sometimes say "Model information cannot be found." It gets an error like this and users cannot view the report.
We thought that the problem was related to authorization, but the same problem is experienced by the user with Admin privilege. My own device is Android and it may ask for a certificate when connected to Datasphere while opening a report. I do not encounter any problems when I proceed without selecting a certificate. Other users trying to access the report have iOS devices. I think the operating system difference may also cause the problem.
I would appreciate it if you could help me with a solution to this situation.

entry.title: How to move all remote table, workspace, view in datasphere and story in sac to another environment?
entry.content:
What is the right procedure / steps to move everything from remote table, views, workspace and etc from datasphere development to datasphere production?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Importing View/Tables from Datasphere to SAC And create a Model in SAC
entry.content: can we import the Datasphere View / tables to SAC and create a model in SAC with live connection? if yes, can we export daily delta datasets to the file server in a flat file format (CSV or XLS format)?

entry.title: Changing Live data source from SAP Datasphere to the new model in SAC Story with the same measures?
entry.content:
Within the SAP Datasphere environment, we duplicate the analytics model but connect it to a different SAP S/4 environment.

  • Model A connect to SAP S/4 DEV
  • Model B connect SAP S/4 QAS

In SAC, we intend to duplicate two stories while maintaining the same settings (Measure):

  • Story A currently connects to Model A.

So We duplicated Story A to create Story B and We replaced Model A with Model B in Story B. However the old settings to disappear.

Could you please suggest us, we have a lot of calculatation measures so we prefer not to recreate the story B from the template?

entry.title: SAP Datasphere: Basic auth for the catalog and consumption OData4 APIs
entry.content: Do the catalog and consumption OData4 APIs for SAP Datasphere support basic auth?

entry.title: SAP Field service management to BW/4Hana
entry.content:
Hi all, 
I am looking for infomation on connection SAP FSM to BW/4HANA or Datasphere.
Does anybody has experiences with that or can give some hints.

Thanks Dirk

entry.title: UI asset listing different from REST API listing
entry.content: Does the API only list views? In the UI I can see local tables, views, analytic models, etc. listed, but when I ask for the listing of the same space via the REST API, only the views are listed. What could explain this?

entry.title: Replication flow in DataSphere not showing the extraction enabled ABAP CDS views
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I was trying to get extraction enabled CDS view in DataSphere , using the replication flow. I am not able to see views like - I_PRODUCT or C_PURCHASEORDERDEX when using the replication flow in DataSphere. 

I do see it when using the export entities in DataSphere.

Please let me know if I am missing anything.

I did check SAP note - 3343889 , 3297105 and 2890171.

Thanks,

Vinay

entry.title: SAP Datasphere Wish List (05/2024)
entry.content:
Below is my current SAP Datasphere functionality wish list:

1) Expose Delta Tables via a View in OpenSQL Space.

-> This allows external tools to access delta changes in local SAP Datasphere tables.

2) When importing SAP CDS Views, control the source of the business name meta-data. Choose between base table or @EndUserTxt annotations in the CDS view.

-> Maintaining consistent metadata between S4/HANA CDS views and Entities in SAP Datasphere is important for clients that report directly out of both systems.

3) Allow Alter Table statements in SQL console for local tables. This could also mean mass CSN/Json changes for tables.

-> I often need to make mass changes to local tables or remote tables. For example, flip them to "In-Memory" or set them to Dimensions.

4) Utility to convert Create Table SQL into CSN/Json

-> Useful when I can't import the table from a source, but I have the DDL from the source.

5) Use the same column editor found when creating SQL based Views in graphical based views. This one is the main reason I mostly do everything in SQL. The editor in the SQL views allows you to make changes to columns in a spreadsheet like format. I should have the same option with graphical views.

6) When replication flows import delta enabled CDS views, they manipulate the data types. For example, the CDS View has a column of abap.dec(26,6) but requires the target table to be dec(27,6) adding one to the precision for every decimal column. We either need some control over this type conversion or a better understanding of what, how and why it converts abap types into HANA types.

7) Full object version history with restore. I should be able to view and compare the version of every object and revert to any historical version. We had this in HANA.

😎 Better data profiling tools for tables and views. I liked the one in HANA Studio. I have to go into the DB Explorer now to do the same. Which means I need a view over every table.

9) View Persistence based on delta tables. I can do this with a replication task now, but it would be nice if view persistence automatically used the delta table when one exists for the main table in a view.

entry.title: MCHB Standard table import zero values in stock columns
entry.content:
I've tried importing the MCHB standard table in DWC from S4 for two client systems. However, both systems bring zero values in stock columns such as CLABS, CINSM, etc.

Is there any particular reason that it is showing zero values

Regards,
Prathamesh Shriram

entry.content:
Hi Experts,

How to export data from SAP Datasphere or its database (SAP HANA Cloud) to Oracle DBMS

Best Regards,

entry.title: Issue with FSM Data
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

we recently connected SAP Fieldservicemanagement (FSM) with SAP Datasphere.

We have two tables that are extracted from FSM, both displaying the data correctly in the preview:

1. BusinessPartners (containing ID, and Name)

2. ServiceCalls (containing ID ServiceCall, ID BusinessPartner and a measure, in this case number of minutes used)

The goal is to show the Measure with the Number of minutes used.

Therefore we prepared the data as followed

1. BusinessPartners (Local Table) -> BusinessPartners (Dimension) 

The Name has the semantic type "Text" and is the Text Association for the ID.

2. ServiceCalls (Local Table) -> ServiceCalls (Fact View)

An Association between the BusinessPartner ID and the ID (from the BusinessPartner Dimension View) is created.

Now an Analytic Model is created.

The data preview presents the ID two times. Presentation selected is ID & Description.

In SAP Analytics Cloud the description equals the ID. If name is selected as poperty, the column will be empty.

 

Thing we tried to solve this issue (without success):

*Creating calculated columns for the ID and Name which will have the exact same value (tried that in different variations)

*Creating a seperate Text View and associate it with the Dimension 

*Making the Local table a relational Dataset and than making it a view (tried that in different variations)

Hope the issue is described well enough, otherwise feel free to reach out. Thank you very much!!

Best, Joelle

entry.title: Dynamic Column Header in Table, using SAC + SAP DataSphere
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

 

Im currently trying to find a solution that would allow me to dynamically change the column header in SAC table (for example, via scripts). As a datasource im using SAP Datasphere.

I managed to accomplish similiar functionality some time ago using a CDS view with Dynamic Text Label, and then changing its value in SAC using scripts. But I can't find a similiar functionality to Dynamic Text Labels in SAP Datasphere.

I would welcome any ideas or feedback. My only workaround right now is to use a text label that covers the table but this solution cause massive formatting issues for me. 

 

Kind regards,

Chris

entry.title: Invalid datetime value when using Python Script in Datasphere
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am still relatively new to the Datasphere and am currently familiarizing myself with Python scripts for data transformation. I am encountering a problem in the mapping, which does not occur without a Python script with pure mapping of field in Datasphere.

My source has 56 fields, which should be extended by 2 additional calculated fields. If I write the data 1:1 (without script) into a target table, the data transformation works. As soon as the script is inserted and the data are passed through the script, the following error message appears:

 

I cannot identify from the error message which column is causing the problem. Is there any way to identify it, or do I have to extend the dataflow column by column and deploy and run the script again and again to determine which column is causing the error?

entry.title: How do I prevent users from uploading an Excel file to their Space?
entry.content:
Hello Everybody,

I need to know, how it is possible to prevent a User in the SAP DataSphere to upload Excel-Files. I tried it with a Test-Scoped-Role but I couldn't find the right settings. 

Tanks!

entry.title: SAP datasphere hibernate
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

Is it possible to hibernate standard Datasphere services, such as HANA Cloud and Data Intelligence, to reduce costs when they are not in use?
